title: Christine Chiramel leaves Rahul Chaudhry & Partners to establish Chiramel & Co IP practice
description: Christine Chiramel has stepped down from her role as Partner - Trade Marks at Rahul Chaudhry & Partners and is set to establish the Intellectual Property practice at Chiramel & Co Solicitors and Advocates, a full-service law firm established in 1985 under the leadership of Jos Chiramel.Over the course of a 17-year legal career, Chiramel has been associated with several of India’s leading intellectual property practices. After completing her LL.M. in 2009 from Benjamin
